name: Wynn the Wind Channeler
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>媒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ウィン
desc:
(This card is always treated as a "Charmer" card.)
You can discard this card and 1 other WIND monster; add 1 WIND monster with 1500 or less DEF from your Deck to your hand, except "Wynn the Wind Channeler", also you cannot activate non-WIND monster effects for the rest of this turn. When your WIND monster is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Wynn the Wind Channeler" once per turn.
